notes: Stable identifier for a business. A business may submit more than one application; businesses never span more than one of train/validation/test.
Unique identifier for a single application. Use this to join your submissions.
Integer-coded industry sector. Codes are anonymized (0..N-1) and carry no real-world sector name.
Integer-coded geography bucket.
Age of the business in years.
Integer-coded company size bucket (smaller code = fewer employees).
Annual revenue as reported by the applicant on the application.
Time in business in years as reported by the applicant.
Loan amount requested by the applicant in dollars (product range roughly $5K-$50K).
Integer-coded stated purpose of the loan.
Whether the applicant linked a bank feed. Bank-feed columns are null when this is false.
Average monthly revenue over the last 3 months from the linked bank feed (dollars). Null if no linked feed.
Recent revenue trend from the bank feed. Null if no linked feed.
Revenue volatility from the bank feed. Null if no linked feed.
10th-percentile daily cash balance from the bank feed (dollars; can be negative). Null if no linked feed.
Count of overdraft events in the last 3 months from the bank feed. Null if no linked feed.
Score for how regular payroll outflows are (higher = more regular). Null if no linked feed.
Aggregate credit utilization ratio from the credit bureau (0-1).
Number of credit inquiries in the last 6 months.
Existing debt obligations in dollars.
Integer-coded band for the owner's personal credit.
Days since the applicant was last declined by another lender. Null if no recorded prior external decline.
Days the applicant has been on the platform.
Number of months of active platform use.
Days since the last bookkeeping activity.
Rate of late invoice payments (0-1).
Number of prior loans this business took with this lender before this application.
Number of those prior loans that defaulted (at most prior_loans_count).
Total dollars borrowed across prior loans with this lender.
Date/time of the application. Determines which cohort_week an application belongs to.
Integer-coded acquisition channel for the application.
Number of near-simultaneous inquiries to multiple lenders in the last 30 days.
Days since the last inquiry to another lender. Null if none recorded.
How many times this business has previously applied with this lender.
Engineered ratio of requested amount to observed monthly revenue.
Score the prior underwriting system assigned to this application (its model is not provided).
The prior underwriter decision: approved or declined. Outcomes are observed only for approved applications.
Amount the prior underwriter approved (may differ from requested). Null if declined.

Whether the loan defaulted. Default triggers on any of: 3 consecutive missed daily draws, 6 cumulative missed draws, or a positive outstanding balance at day 90 (see README). Present only for prior-approved and matured loans; null for declined or immature loans.
Day in [1,90] on which the loan first met a default condition. Null if it did not default.
Day on which the loan was fully repaid. Null if it defaulted or has not matured.
Observed end state: paid_in_full, defaulted, or open.
Dollars recovered after a default. Null otherwise.
Whether the loan has matured or is still censored (not yet fully observed).
